description: You are configuring the HMI for a polyurethane mixing plant to prevent unauthorized operators from dismissing critical exothermic alarms. Create a new project and configure a Float tag named 'Reactor_Temp' with an 'Absolute High' Alarm 1 set to 180.0. Create a user named 'Supervisor' (Username: super, Password: Admin123!) with 'User Right 2' assigned. Configure the 'Reactor_Temp' Alarm 1 to require 'User Right 2' for acknowledgment. Add an 'Alarm Viewer' primitive to Page 1. Save the project as 'reactor_secure.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\.
